description: A sought after, RARE Lake Arabelle floorplan with must have FIRST FLOOR LIVING, TURFED maintenance free oversized backyard, BONUS Gameroom (or 4th Bedroom with full bath) & Rooftop Patio. This 3/4 bed, 3.5 bath InTown Home located in a gated community, offers all the space you need with hardwood floors on the main floor, tons of storage, high ceilings & plenty of natural light through its North/South orientation. The airy 1st floor features an open floor plan with a renovated Kitchen, that seamlessly connects the dedicated Living & Dining spaces! Upstairs you will find the split bedroom plan with the Primary Bedroom (with TWO massive walk in closets) & two guest bedrooms with a shared bathroom. The Third Floor features the Gameroom (or 4th bedroom) with a full bathroom & access to the Rooftop Patio for additional entertaining space! Amenities include a dog park, walking trail & pool! Furnace replaced 2024. Water/Sewer/Trash covered by HOA. Fridge & Westinghouse Generator STAY

description: Exquisitely landscaped, this stunning two-story residence showcases a beautifully designed open layout tailored for both refined living and effortless entertaining. The expansive living area is anchored by a striking fireplace, seamlessly flowing into the main living spaces while being bathed in natural light for a warm yet elevated ambiance. The primary suite offers a private retreat, complete with a spa-inspired en suite bath featuring a soaking tub and a separate walk-in shower. Secondary bedrooms are generously sized and finished with plush carpeting, providing comfort and versatility for all. A spacious game room adds another layer of flexibility, perfect for entertaining or relaxing. Outdoors, the expansive backyard presents endless possibilities, offering ample space for gatherings, outdoor living, and creating your own private oasis. This home effortlessly blends sophistication, comfort, and timeless appeal.

description:
Welcome to 3810 Drake, a FRANKEL built residence offering the level of craftsmanship, efficiency, and thoughtful design expected from one of Houston’s premier luxury builders.  With a timeless curb appeal, the home is tucked away on a gently curved street lined with Old Oaks, in the heart of Sunset Terrace, a quiet residential pocket of 77005 zoning into WEST UNIVERSITY ELEMENTARY.  Set on a sizable 7,687 SF lot, the backyard delivers what so few in this area can – a true outdoor retreat with POOL, GRASS space, and a COVERED PATIO with summer kitchen.  A hard-to-find combination in 77005.  WALNUT wood floors throughout connect open plan living spaces with large formals, stunning updated kitchen with Wolf/Sub Zero appliances and a light filled living room with views out over the pool. Four bedrooms up with separate GAMEROOM.  An ELEVATOR in place adds long-term livability. LEED Certified and Energy Star Platinum, with 16+ SEER HVAC for enhanced efficiency.  Zone X 
(Per seller).

description: Nestled in the gated community of Terraces on Memorial, this beautifully maintained home blends comfort, style, and effortless living. Enjoy a private backyard retreat with a sparkling pool, covered patio, and outdoor fireplace—perfect for relaxing or entertaining. Inside, hand-scraped wood floors and an open-concept layout create a warm, inviting atmosphere. The island kitchen with Thermador appliances flows seamlessly into the family room. The first floor offers a serene primary suite, secondary bedroom, and private study. Upstairs features three bedrooms, two baths, a gameroom, and media room. Walking distance to Terry Hershey Park with access to the Briarhills community center, pool, tennis courts, and clubhouse. Recent updates include a new roof, two water heaters, and energy-efficient windows.

description:
It is our joy to welcome you to the Boxwood/V24B floor plan, one of our beautiful two-story homes located in the Legacy Village community! This home features four bedrooms, two-and-a-half bathrooms, and a two-car garage. This house spans 1,659 square feet and will be a lovely home for you and your family!

As you enter the abode, you arrive in the foyer, which leads to the family room, kitchen, and dining room. This is an open concept living and dining space, providing optimal comfort and functionality in its design. The vinyl flooring and bright windows in this part of the house gives the home a bright and inviting air, making the home perfect for hosting guests or relaxing on the weekend! In addition, the kitchen is equipped with a tall pantry, a kitchen island, and stainless-steel appliances. A powder room is positioned near the kitchen and is complete with a pedestal sink.

A staircase sits behind the kitchen and leads to the second story of the home. Trekking upstairs, you arrive in a hallway leading to the secondary bathroom and various bedrooms within the home. The primary bedroom sits closest to the stairs and is complete with carpet flooring. The bedroom leads to the primary bathroom, which has vinyl flooring, a standing shower, a double sink, a separate toilet room, and a walk-in closet.

description: Nestled in the heart of Garden Oaks, this custom home embodies the warmth of the neighborhood. Featuring custom interior finishes and stately stone on the exterior, this beautiful home offers a low-maintenance backyard including a saltwater heated pool and a hot tub, artificial turf, and no two-story homes on either side.  Inside is natural wood and stone flooring throughout almost the entire home.  Finishing touches such as crown molding, arched walkways, plantation shutters, custom newel posts, granite counters, stone fireplace, two office spaces, and an abundance of natural light are found in this the open-layout home.  The ceilings are 10ft down & 9ft ceilings up except primary bedroom (vaulted) and the primary bath (cathedral).  Wine closet with custom iron doors is downstairs near the walk-in pantry.  Rainbird sprinkler system.  This home was built by Alleanza Custom Homes.  It is located within walking distance of D'Alba & Wakefield locations.

description: This beautifully designed New Construction two-story home offers 2,035 sq. ft. of thoughtfully planned living space, featuring first-floor living and a spacious game room or versatile flex area upstairs. The primary suite impresses with two generous walk-in closets and a vaulted ceiling that enhances the open, airy ambiance. Throughout the home, high ceilings and abundant natural light create a bright, welcoming atmosphere. The kitchen stands out with expanded countertop space rarely found in comparable homes and a true farmhouse sink, blending style and functionality perfectly. This is the floor plan you will love! Please schedule your private tour today!

description: Tucked behind charming iron gates in Houston’s desirable Energy Corridor, this beautifully maintained home blends comfort, space, and style. Soaring ceilings and sun-filled interiors create a warm, inviting feel, while a private deck surrounded by mature trees offers the perfect escape. Designed for both everyday living and entertaining, you’ll find a spacious family room with fireplace, formal dining, and a bright breakfast area. Storage is exceptional, featuring generous closets throughout—including a unique cedar closet. The serene primary suite boasts peaceful views, a spa-like bath, and an oversized walk-in closet. Secondary bedrooms are well-sized, and the flexible study with closet can serve as a fourth bedroom. Enjoy community amenities like a pool and tennis courts, all just minutes from top medical, dining, and shopping destinations. Currently tenant-occupied through May 1.

description:
Fresh, bright, and beautifully reworked, this 2-bedroom condo delivers the kind of everyday ease buyers notice immediately: an open layout, clean modern finishes, and no carpet anywhere for a sleek, low-maintenance feel. The kitchen has been fully refreshed with crisp cabinetry, updated surfaces, and bar seating that keeps the space connected and inviting.

The bedrooms offer flexibility for restful retreat, guests, or a dedicated work-from-home setup. The bathroom renovation brings a polished, contemporary look that elevates the home well beyond typical entry-level condo inventory. Outside the unit, the gated community and pool add another layer of convenience and lifestyle appeal. 

Set in a location with convenient access to the Galleria area, Westchase, and major commuter routes, this is the kind of updated, easy-living property that tends to draw strong attention in this price category. Schedule your private showing and see how well the layout lives in person.

description: Bright, modern living with tall ceilings, rich hardwoods, and sunlight in all the right places. The open great room blends a comfortable living area with a sleek kitchen featuring a pendant-lit island, long prep runs, tile backsplash, gas range, and a full wall of cabinetry. A flexible dining or home office zone adds work-from-home convenience without sacrificing flow. The spacious primary suite has room for a sitting area, and the adjoining bath features a large glass shower. A well-sized secondary bedroom and fresh guest bath make hosting simple. Practical perks include a stacked laundry closet, ample storage, and an HVAC compressor replaced in 2023. Zoned to William Wharton K-8 Dual Language Academy, Gregory-Lincoln Middle School, and Lamar High School, and set in a prime Montrose location with quick access to neighborhood dining, shopping, and easy commutes to Midtown, the Museum District, and Downtown. Walking distance to all the hottest restaurants!

Enjoy cedar-lined closets, durable wood laminate flooring throughout (no carpet), and thoughtful upgrades totaling approximately $20,000. The monthly maintenance covers electricity, water, sewer, and trash, providing exceptional value and convenience.

description: Beautifully maintained David Weekley home nestled within a gated community in the highly sought-after Spring Branch area. This thoughtfully designed residence offers first-floor living with a functional, open-concept layout that  connects the kitchen, dining, and living areas, deal for both everyday living and entertaining. The newly turfed backyard provides a low-maintenance outdoor retreat, while the dedicated home office offers the perfect space for remote work or creative projects. Upstairs, you’ll find all bedrooms conveniently located off a spacious game room, which can serve as a secondary living area, playroom, or additional office space. Notable updates include a recent Samsung Smart refrigerator, Bosch dishwasher, blackout screens on rear-facing windows, an upgraded HVAC plenum, and a UV light added to the system for enhanced air quality. Schedule your tour today!

A spacious first-floor en-suite bedroom features double doors leading to a private, fenced backyard.

description: Welcome to this warm and inviting 3-bedroom, 2-bath home in the desirable Walnut Bend neighborhood, where classic character meets comfortable modern updates. You’ll love the relaxed feel of the family room, complete with high vaulted ceilings and a cozy brick fireplace, while the gourmet kitchen offers plenty of granite counter space, crisp white cabinetry, and a sunny breakfast nook, perfect for your morning coffee. A formal dining room conveniently connects to the kitchen. A home office is located at the front of the home. The primary bedroom serves as a peaceful retreat with an en-suite bath. Additional upgrades include: New windows, gutters, paint, A/C & ductwork. Perfectly situated in a wonderful location, you can walk to local favorites like Whole Foods and Target or enjoy the neighborhood park, pool, and tennis courts, all with quick access to the Energy Corridor and Terry Hershey Park trails.

description: Explore this newly updated duplex at 7939 Goode St in Houston—a property that blends modern style with great earning potential. Each side offers 2 comfortable bedrooms and 1 refreshed bathroom, finished with contemporary touches throughout. The layout is open and inviting, connecting the living area to a modern kitchen featuring updated counters, sleek cabinetry, and durable flooring. Natural light fills the space through generously sized windows, creating a bright, welcoming feel. A fully fenced yard provides added privacy and a great outdoor area for relaxing or hosting. Whether you're looking to invest or prefer to live in one unit and rent out the other, this property offers flexibility and lasting value. Conveniently located near major roads, shopping, dining, and everyday essentials.

description: Located in the gated Cedar Springs community, this beautifully maintained 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath home pairs timeless curb appeal with an airy, upscale feel inside. High ceilings and abundant natural light elevate the open living spaces, while the thoughtfully designed layout offers both comfort and flexibility. The kitchen features extensive cabinetry, generous counter space, gas cooking, and a sunny breakfast area that connects seamlessly to the main living area. The spacious primary retreat is complemented by a bath with dual sinks, a soaking tub, and separate shower. Well-proportioned secondary bedrooms provide options for guests, work, or additional living needs. Downstairs study offers flexibility for a guest room, bedroom, home office or other bonus use. Complete with a 2-car garage and convenient access to major west Houston corridors, this home offers a refined blend of space, style, and everyday ease.

description: Welcome to 240 W 23rd St, ideally located in sought-after Houston Heights with easy access to popular dining, shopping, & local parks. Charming 2 story home with flexible living spaces & great natural light. Welcoming entry showcases classic wood trim details leading into a spacious living room, ideal for gathering, relaxing, or entertaining. Large kitchen offers extensive cabinetry, great prep space, built-in storage, plus a large range with vent hood and opens to the dining area offering space for hosting meals & everyday dining. Dedicated home office with French doors, plus an additional built-in desk area in the hall is great for a study nook or work-from-home setup. 8 spacious and versatile bedrooms each with direct access to a full bath. Wonderful front porch overlooking a fenced in front yard. Large parking area in the front and back of the home provides extra parking space. Great opportunity with space, function, & character all in one!

description: Mature trees frame this brick home centered around an interior courtyard. This one-story, four-bedroom home features a primary suite with an ensuite bath and two walk-in closets. One secondary bedroom could easily serve as a home office with French doors and a large built-in shelving wall. The breakfast area may become your favorite place to start the day, with two windows bringing in natural light. The dining room is the brightest space, with three windows overlooking the front yard and additional windows facing the courtyard, ready to become a private oasis. The utility room offers dual access from the primary suite and secondary bedroom wing. The home also features PEX plumbing. Ideally located near Terry Hershey Park with 11+ miles of hike and bike trails, playgrounds, and picnic areas, and in the heart of the Energy Corridor near major Oil & Gas companies, restaurants, and shopping. Come see this unique home and picture life here!

description: Welcome to Lakewood Heights, where this beautiful one-story home is ready to impress from the moment you pull up. With four bedrooms, 2 full bathrooms, & an open floor plan designed for real living, this home just feels right from the moment you walk in. The kitchen overlooks the family room & features granite countertops & stainless steel appliances. Brand new carpet installed in the bedrooms. The primary suite is a true retreat with a soaking tub, separate shower, double sinks, & a walk-in closet that won't disappoint. Three additional bedrooms give you the flexibility for guests, a home office, or whatever fits your life. The two-car attached garage & generous lot round out the package nicely. & then there's the community, boat launches, a fishing pier, a pool, & a community center all overlooking Lake Houston. This is more than just a home, it's a lifestyle. Space, updates, & a community that truly has it all waiting for you. Don't let this one slip by!

description:
Corner Townhome with Rare 3-Car Garage in Gated Lake Community

Stunning corner townhome located in a quiet cul-de-sac within a serene gated lake community. Situated in Phase II of a well-established neighborhood, this home offers convenient access to the Texas Medical Center, Downtown, and MetroRail—ideal for professionals seeking comfort and connectivity.

Community Amenities:
Expansive green spaces, two scenic lakes, community swimming pool, jogging and walking trails, and a 24-hour manned gatehouse.

Property Features:

description:
Looking for charm, space, and a great location just outside the Loop? Tucked into Brookwood Estates just north of 610, this exceptionally well-maintained 3-bedroom, 2-bath home sits on an oversized lot along quiet, tree-lined streets, offering a more relaxed neighborhood feel while staying close to everything you love nearby.

Major updates include a new roof (2025), PEX plumbing with tankless water heater (2025), updated HVAC with UV system (2025), and full irrigation. The backyard features improved drainage, landscaping, and lighting for both function and enjoyment.

Inside, a comfortable layout and renovated primary closet add to the home’s livability. With quick access to 610, 290, and I-10, you’re minutes from popular dining, shopping, and neighborhood favorites.

Be sure to review the Seller Upgrade List attached for a full overview of improvements.

Don’t miss your chance - opportunities like this in Brookwoods Estates are few and far between.

description: Set in the highly sought-after Meyerland area, this quintessential ranch-style home has been thoughtfully refreshed with a brand-new roof and a floor plan designed for both comfort and ease of living. Located on a sunny, light-filled street, the home offers spacious bedrooms, generous closet space, and a layout that blends functionality with everyday charm. Inside, a welcoming open-concept design connects the dining area, inviting kitchen with breakfast nook, and main family room, creating an effortless flow for daily living and entertaining. Privately tucked away behind French doors, the office/game room offers flexible space for work, play, or quiet retreat. A large utility room and a backyard with plenty of room for outdoor living further enhance the appeal of this move-in-ready home. Notable updates include new roof and siding (2026), HVAC (2021), fresh interior paint (2026), and double-pane windows. Zoned to Parker Elementary, Meyerland Middle School, and Westbury High School.

description: Beautifully designed H-TEX home in Oak Forest that truly lives the way families need it to. The open layout, hardwood floors, and natural light create a warm, welcoming feel throughout. An automatic driveway gate adds an extra layer of privacy to this already special home. Schedule a tour today!

description: This beautiful, freestanding home sits inside a private community in popular Shady Acres. Upon entering you're greeted by a sizable foyer that leads to the first floor bedroom with backyard access. Fresh paint and a large, open living space, natural light and soaring ceilings welcome you to the main floor.  The kitchen opens to living/dining combo allowing for easy entertaining and has been recently updated with new appliances. The large primary bed on third floor is complete with new carpet, 2 large walk-in closets, primary bath with dual sinks, soaking tub & separate shower. The additional secondary bedrooms also has an en-suite bathroom and generously sized closet. Outside, step out to new fully fenced yard with heated pool, turfed green space and spacious lounging area outfitted with pest control & mosquito misting system. Backyard is plumbed & gas line run for outdoor kitchen. Ideal location close to restaurants and bike trails with easy hwy access. Zoned to Sinclair Elementary!

description: Discover the perfect blend of modern upgrades and timeless charm in this stunning one-story brick home located in the coveted Brook Forest neighborhood. Step through a quaint private courtyard into a seamless, light-filled open floor plan featuring luxury vinyl plank flooring and beautiful Anderson windows throughout. The gourmet kitchen is a chef’s dream, boasting quartz countertops, soft-close cabinetry, and recent stainless steel appliances. With four spacious bedrooms & two flexible bonus rooms—ideal for a home office, gym, or hobby room. The oversized primary suite offers a private retreat with an ensuite bath featuring a walk-in shower and a large walk-in closet. Major system updates: AC (2024), Water Heater (2024), Roof (2024), and Pex Piping (2021). The secondary bath features a convenient walk-in tub (2022) and double sinks. Located minutes from UHCL, Clear Lake High School, parks, and trails. Refrigerator, washer, and dryer are included!

description: Stunning custom-built home on a quiet cul-de-sac w/private, tropical backyard oasis— sparkling pool w/covered patio, gas fire pit, outdoor kitchen and lush landscaping make this home ideal for outdoor entertaining. Perfectly located near the greenbelt trail & within walking distance to highly rated elementary & middle schools. This meticulously maintained gem features beautiful woodwork, hardwood floors throughout the main living areas & an elegant staircase w/wood treads. Highlights include an oversized office, bright breakfast room w/bay window, & a spacious game room w/vaulted ceilings. The living room offers a dramatic wall of windows & a cozy corner fireplace. The kitchen shines with granite countertops & stainless steel appliances. Granite counters continue in the bathrooms for a polished look. Finished garage! Recent updates include a new roof (Nov 2025) & 2 new AC units (2024). Immaculate, move-in ready & full of charm— this is the one you’ve been waiting for!

description: Welcome to Highland Gardens, a beautiful gated community of 35 new homes by Homes by Faircroft, located in the the heart of Houston’s fastest growing Highland Heights sub market. These 2 story, 3 bedroom, 2 ½ bath homes feature two floor plans, one with living downstairs and one with living up. Both floor plans are perfect for lock and leave, low maintenance living. Soaring 10 foot ceilings highlight open floor plans. The modern kitchen with sleek wood cabinets, stainless steel appliances and quartz countertops is the heart of the home. Stylish, durable luxury vinyl plank flooring runs throughout the home. An elegant oak staircase leads to the generous primary bedroom, featuring truly large walk-in closets. The primary bath features double vanities and spacious shower. Additional highlights include a dedicated storage closet, two car garage and secure access gate. Just minutes from Winzer Park and Houston Downtown. Schedule your tour today!!

Just minutes from Winzer Park and down town. Schedule your tour today!!

description: Fantastic all brick home with ADU/guest house just minutes from downtown, Texas Medical Center, UofH, freeways, and more! The back house is your perfect house hack for additional rental income, or flex space for studio/gym/office, the options are endless. Fantastic large front porch and fully fenced/gated. An opportunity to make this your own or a fantastic investment/rental property. Three bedrooms in the front home and a large room/bedroom with full bath in the back home. Great backyard as well!

description: Nestled within the established and sought-after community of Clear Lake, this charming 3 bedroom, 2 bath residence offers the perfect blend of comfort, functionality, and timeless neighborhood appeal. The interior welcomes you to a warm and inviting living space anchored by a beautiful fireplace that creates the perfect setting for both relaxing evenings and entertaining guests. Thoughtfully designed kitchen boasts abundant cabinet space and seamlessly connects to the dining area, making everyday living effortless and gatherings feel natural and connected. Primary suite features an en-suite bath with soaking tub positioned beneath a picture window that overlooks a private courtyard. Two secondary bedrooms are tucked away for added privacy offering a functional layout that balances both shared and personal spaces with ease. Pipers Meadow living includes access to a sparkling community pool, tennis courts, basketball court, and a beautiful neighborhood park just moments away.

Step inside to discover a thoughtfully renovated interior featuring an open-concept layout, abundant natural light, and stylish finishes throughout. The updated kitchen boasts contemporary cabinetry, quartz countertops, and modern appliances—perfect for both everyday living and entertaining.

description: Lock & leave luxury in this beautifully designed, gated community home! Two secondary bedrooms, a full bath, and a conveniently located laundry room complete the second floor. Enjoy evenings in the backyard—your perfect retreat at the end of the day! Centrally located minutes from major freeways, shopping, dining, and more, this home is a must-see.

description: Welcome to this exquisite modern residence where thoughtful design meets direct access to nature. Located in the gated Reserve in Memorial, this home sits on a premium lot w/ greenspace views of Terry Hershey Park. Step inside and enjoy warm wood floors, high ceilings, & abundant natural light throughout. The first level is ideal for both everyday living and entertaining with spacious game room, full bedroom/bath, & covered back deck. Moving upstairs you’ll find the bright open kitchen, family room and dining room. Kitchen boasts quartz backsplash, gas range, and large custom island. A private study completes the second floor. Finally the third level features the luxurious primary suite with spa-like amenities & custom closet, a sizable flex space, & third bedroom w/ en-suite bath. Thoughtful finishes and upgrades include whole-home generator, covered patios, elevator capable, & built for EFL platinum energy savings. Quality build throughout in a fantastic Memorial location!Per Seller

description: Located in one of Houston’s best neighborhoods, Afton Oaks, this exceptional 5,000 SF residence blends refined luxury with thoughtful design. Soaring ceilings frame the study and formal dining. The chef’s kitchen features Sub-Zero/Wolf appliances, dual dishwashers, two sinks, gas range, walk-in pantry, and an air-conditioned wine room. The light-filled living room and upstairs game room each offer dedicated home-theater systems with whole-home audio. A first-floor guest suite provides convenience and privacy for visitors. Upstairs, the tranquil primary retreat includes a private balcony, spa-inspired bath with double vanities, soaking tub, separate shower, and an expansive walk-in closet. Outdoor living features a covered patio, outdoor kitchen, mosquito system, and fruit trees. Elevator-ready with a 3-car epoxy-floored garage and EV outlet- a must see listing!

description: This Clear Lake beauty checks ALL the boxes and then some. 5 bedrooms, 2.5 baths, an open layout, and a massive kitchen island that's begging for snacks, wine nights, and game days. You've got quartz counters, stainless appliances, updated fixtures + lighting , and a gas/wood-burning fireplace for cozy vibes. Both full baths bring the wow factor with walk-in showers and double sinks, plus there is a handy half bath tucked right off the laundry room- perfect for guests. Step out back to a huge deck made for entertaining and hot tubing, a separate garage, long driveway and tons of parking. And the cherry on top? Quick access to I-45, Baybrook Mall, tons of shopping + dining AND low taxes!

description: Prime location, near Washington Ave. A convenient walk to surrounding entertainment, dining, & shopping.  The modern home features a great entertaining space, wood floors, lots of light, and high ceilings with a dramatic wall of windows in the living area. Open kitchen with stainless steel appliances, granite, island, gas cooking, lots of cabinets, walk-in pantry, and laundry with a full-size washer & dryer.  The spacious primary suite bath has a huge soaking tub, a large separate shower, and a huge walk-in closet. 2nd bedroom living on 1st floor with full bath. Gated, full-size 2-car garage and a spacious, gated private patio with turf. Minutes from Memorial Park, River Oaks, & Downtown.

description: Lock & leave luxury in this beautifully designed, gated community home! The open-concept first floor is perfect for entertaining, featuring an oversized family room with a wall of windows, stylish finishes, and a chef-worthy kitchen with stainless steel appliances, convection oven, pendant lighting, and an oversized island. Upstairs, all 3 bedrooms offer privacy, including a spacious primary suite with abundant natural light, double vanity, designer tub, and oversized frameless glass shower. Two secondary bedrooms, a full bath, and a conveniently located laundry room complete the second floor. Enjoy evenings in the backyard—your perfect retreat at the end of the day! Centrally located minutes from major freeways, shopping, dining, and more, this home is a must-see.

description: Situated on an oversized lot on a quiet residential street, this completely renovated sprawling ranch home is an absolute turn key opportunity. From the inviting courtyard, step into this open concept floor plan home with newly tiled floors, light neutral colors and abundant natural light throughout. The gourmet kitchen features white cabinetry and drawers with oversized kitchen island with glistening quartz countertops. The large Living area features a cozy fireplace and glass doors that look out on to  the patio and private backyard paradise. The Primary Suite features a large bedroom with courtyard views and beautifully appointed spa-like bath with generously large shower, dual vanities and walk in closet. The home also features two additional well sized bedrooms which share a  tastefully appointment bathroom. This all comes with a large two car garage and in-house utility room. Located outside of the flood plain and zoned to well rated Cy-Fair schools. The home shows beautifully.
